title: Implement secretx-oci-vault backend
description: Implement the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Vault backend. Stub README exists at secretx-oci-vault/README.md. URI: secretx:oci-vault:<compartment-id>/<secret-name>. Auth via OCI config file or instance principal. Implements SecretStore, WritableSecretStore, and SigningBackend (OCI Vault HSM-backed keys). SDK reference: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest
